# Description

# [PKT-PRV-070](task-0137): Provider Data Catalog Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data catalog rules.

## Scope

- Catalog rules
- Indexing
- Search

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Add indexing
3. Add search

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Indexed
3. Searchable
